// what we do

We make your business unstoppable.

We're a software development agency that builds custom software and AI automations from scratch. Internal tools, automated workflows, and business process automation. Systems that eliminate the manual work killing your team's time. No templates. Ever.

0%

Bespoke builds. No templates.

0X

Average efficiency gain for clients.

0

Zero off-the-shelf solutions. Ever.

// who we work with

Industries we've transformed.

Music & EntertainmentIndependent LabelsTattoo & Creative StudiosPhysiotherapy & HealthcareStreetwear & FashionD2C E-CommerceAI & Productivity ToolsLogistics & OpsMusic & EntertainmentIndependent LabelsTattoo & Creative StudiosPhysiotherapy & HealthcareStreetwear & FashionD2C E-CommerceAI & Productivity ToolsLogistics & Ops
01

Music & Entertainment

Royalty splits, catalogue systems, artist-facing tools. We've built the operational backbone for independent labels and artists at scale.

02

Healthcare & Clinics

Booking automation, patient records, billing flows. From physiotherapy clinics to clinic networks across India - we replace the manual with the automatic.

03

Creative & Commerce

Tattoo studio CRMs, streetwear storefronts, D2C order pipelines. We build the software that lets creative businesses stop doing admin and start creating.

// the difference

Why GOATED.

01

We start with your problem, not our stack.

Most agencies sell you their preferred technology. We map your workflow first, then pick the right tool for the job.

02

We build things that actually get used.

Beautiful software that nobody uses is worthless. Every build goes through real operational testing with your team.

03

We move fast. Unusually fast.

Our first working prototype lands in your hands within 2 weeks. You give feedback on real software, not mockups.

04

We disappear when the job is done.

No lock-in. No retainer dependency. We document everything, hand it over clean, and you own it fully.

// case studies

What we've built.

Custom software development and AI automation projects for businesses across healthcare, music, e-commerce, and creative industries. All live and in production.

View all case studies →
// the team

Small team. Serious output.

We built GOATED. because we kept seeing the same problem - brilliant businesses held back by manual processes and generic tools. We're engineers and operators, based in Mumbai. We fix that.

Engineer

B.E. BITS Pilani

// frequently asked questions

Questions we get asked.

A custom software development agency builds tailored software solutions from scratch for businesses. Unlike off-the-shelf tools, custom software is designed around your specific workflows, processes, and goals. At GOATED., we build internal tools, automated workflows, CRMs, booking systems, e-commerce platforms, and AI-powered applications for businesses across India.

We start with your problem, not our tech stack. Every solution we build is 100% bespoke with zero templates or off-the-shelf components. We deliver working prototypes within 2 weeks, not months. And when the project is done, you own everything with no lock-in or retainer dependency.

AI automation uses artificial intelligence to handle repetitive tasks, make decisions, and streamline workflows that would otherwise require manual effort. This includes automated data entry, smart scheduling, AI-powered customer communication, document processing, and predictive analytics. Our clients typically see a 3x efficiency gain after implementing AI automation.

We deliver a working prototype within 2 weeks of starting. Most projects reach full production in 4 to 8 weeks depending on complexity. We move fast because we scope tightly and build iteratively. You test real software from week one, not static mockups.

Yes. While we are based in Mumbai, India, we work with clients globally. Our process is fully remote-friendly with async communication, regular demos, and complete documentation. We have delivered projects for clients across India, the United States, and beyond.

We have built custom software and AI automation solutions for music and entertainment, healthcare and clinics, creative studios, D2C e-commerce, fashion and streetwear, logistics and operations, and AI productivity tools. Our approach works for any business that relies on manual processes or generic tools that do not fit their workflow.

Every project is scoped individually based on complexity, timeline, and requirements. We offer transparent, fixed-price proposals after an initial discovery call. Our pricing reflects the value of fully custom, production-grade software built from scratch with no hidden fees, no hourly billing surprises, and no recurring platform costs.

Ready to be unstoppable?

Prefer email?

Drop us a line directly and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
